title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
